title: Shared scheduler primitives
description: Reusable definitions for geographic locations, celestial targets, time intervals, and proper motion metadata.

geographic.description: Geographic coordinates (longitude/latitude in degrees, height above WGS84 ellipsoid in meters) — matches siderust Geodetic<ECEF> serialization.

height_m.description: Height above the WGS84 ellipsoid (unit depends on the concrete length type; for Geodetic<ECEF> this is meters).

targetPosition.description: Celestial direction expressed as right ascension and declination in degrees.

properMotion.description: Proper motion in right ascension and declination (degrees per Julian year).

ra_μ.description: Proper motion in RA (deg/Julian year), typically includes the cos(δ) term.

target.description: Astronomical target with direction, epoch, and optional proper motion.

time.description: Julian Date of the catalog epoch.

proper_motion.description: Proper motion data (null when the target is assumed static).

intervalScheduled.description: A time window measured in Modified Julian Days. Field names match tempoch Period<MJD> serde output.

start_mjd.description: Interval start expressed as an MJD.

end_mjd.description: Interval end expressed as an MJD.
